uplink.description: Metering uplink: water temperature, hydrostatic pressure, cumulative volume, battery
uplink._note: Synthetic in-bounds TLV stream. fPort 1 with sensor records 0x01 temp (185 -> 18.5 C, 0.1 C/LSB), 0x10 pressure (3500 mbar==hPa -> 350 kPa, /10), 0x11 consumption (12345 L, litres as-is), 0x13 battery (3600 mV -> 3.6 V). expected.data is the upstream raw decode converted to canonical vocabulary units.

uplink.description: Valve flow event (state 1): flow active with per-event time and litres
uplink._note: Synthetic. Command 0x07 state 1: flow=0, consumptionTime=30, consumptionLiter=200. These are per-flow-event extras (camelCase), distinct from the cumulative metering total.
Synthetic. Command byte 0xFF is not a defined Aqua-Scope command; codec reports an error rather than upstream's data.error envelope.
